name: CA Certificates
description: Adds a custom CA certificate to the OS trust store and optionally exports common environment variables (e.g. NODE_EXTRA_CA_CERTS, SSL_CERT_FILE) for tools that need it set explicitly.

cert.description: PEM-encoded CA certificate content to trust. May contain multiple concatenated certificates. Leave empty to skip installation.

cert_filename.description: Filename to use when installing the certificate under /usr/local/share/ca-certificates/. Must end in .crt.

set_env_vars.description: Export common CA-related environment variables (NODE_EXTRA_CA_CERTS, SSL_CERT_FILE, SSL_CERT_DIR, REQUESTS_CA_BUNDLE, CURL_CA_BUNDLE, GIT_SSL_CAINFO, PIP_CERT, AWS_CA_BUNDLE) pointing at the installed certificate/bundle. Only applies when 'cert' is set.
